elements.title: snail mosque
elements.contents: ... that the "snail mosque" (pictured), designed by a non-Muslim, has been noted as resembling Indonesia's parliamentary complex?

elements.title: Brian D. Ballard
elements.contents: ... that lobbyist Brian D. Ballard has represented The Trump Organization and the Socialist Party of Albania?

elements.title: dominated internal community discourse
elements.contents: ... that differing perceptions on identity amongst Assyrians have dominated internal community discourse for several decades?

elements.title: Ja'Deion High
elements.contents: ... that Ja'Deion High took time off from his job as a truck driver to represent the United States in flag football?

elements.title: Firefly
elements.contents: ... that Honkai: Star Rail fans prepared vigils for the in-game death of the character Firefly?

elements.title: a 1978 labor dispute
elements.contents: ... that the mayor of Memphis, Tennessee, accused striking firefighters of committing arson during a 1978 labor dispute?

elements.title: Ingrid Schmithüsen
elements.contents: ... that soprano Ingrid Schmithüsen performed a repertoire of more than 4000 art songs in a recital series that she founded in Cologne?

elements.title: an Egg railway station
elements.contents: ... that an Egg railway station was painted pink and orange?

elements.title: Pat O'Keeffe
elements.contents: ... that Pat O'Keeffe tried to recruit a milk-cart driver during World War I by asking "don't you want to serve your King?", only to be answered: "Yus. How many quarts will he want?"?
